metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace organized by category: reasoning (think, grill), code-quality (review, zoom-out, tdd), workflow (commit, gh), and planning (to-prd, to-issues).

plugins.name: think
plugins.description: Adopt an expert persona (Software Architect, UX Designer, etc.) and reason through a problem from their perspective. Includes an editable persona library and /think:like and /think:add commands.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create git commits with imperative titles, detailed body paragraphs, bulleted Changes: sections, and closing impact statements.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Conduct comprehensive code reviews analyzing security, performance, quality, style, architecture, and documentation, with a 0-100 scoring rubric, written to a local markdown file under ai/reviews/.

plugins.name: zoom-out
plugins.description: Go up a layer of abstraction and map the relevant modules and callers around an area of code, using the project's domain glossary vocabulary. Manually invoked via /zoom-out.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development with the red-green-refactor loop: vertical slices over horizontal, behavior-driven tests through public interfaces, and refactoring only once green. Adapted from mattpocock/skills.

plugins.name: gh
plugins.description: GitHub CLI workflows for issues and projects: view open work, generate period digests, prepare standups, move issue statuses on project boards, and draft well-formed issues with correct labels.

plugins.name: grill
plugins.description: Stress-test a plan or design through relentless one-at-a-time interviewing that resolves each branch of the decision tree. Includes a docs-aware variant that challenges terminology against the domain model and updates CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline.

plugins.name: to-prd
plugins.description: Synthesize the current conversation and codebase understanding into a Product Requirements Document, written as a local markdown file under ai/prds/. No interview — just synthesis.

plugins.name: to-issues
plugins.description: Break a plan, spec, or PRD into self-contained, independently-grabbable issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices, written as local markdown files under ai/issues/.
